skill_schema.description: Every action in the game is a skill. This includes movement, combat, magic, camera control, UI interaction, and even breathing.

fields.name: Display name
fields.category: movement | combat | magic | control | guide | social | craft
fields.description: What the skill does in game terms
fields.lore: Why this skill exists in the world's narrative
fields.is_innate: true if granted at birth (e.g. ver_guia). Cannot be lost.
fields.atoms: Array of effect atoms that compose this skill. Each atom is executed in order.
fields.cooldown: Seconds before the skill can be used again
fields.input_type: button | trigger | hold | toggle | axis | gesture
fields.input_sensitivity: For triggers/axes: how input magnitude affects output (0.0-1.0)
fields.animation_hint: Suggested visual representation (for engines that support it)
fields.combo_triggers: Skills auto-cast on specific conditions (e.g. parry_success → riposte)

atom_types.hit: Direct damage to target. Params: amount, damage_type, element, knockback.
atom_types.move: Spatial movement. Params: kind (dash/jump/teleport/push), distance, duration, direction, i_frames.
atom_types.buff: Temporary stat modification. Params: stat, value, kind (add/multiply), duration.
atom_types.status: Apply status effect. Params: status_id, duration, chance.
atom_types.dot: Damage over time. Params: amount, interval, duration, element.
atom_types.burst_aoe: Area of effect burst. Params: radius, shape, amount, element.
atom_types.projectile: Ranged projectile. Params: speed, lifetime, on_hit_atoms.
atom_types.camera: Camera manipulation. Params: axis (yaw/pitch/roll), speed, sensitivity, relative.
atom_types.interact: Interaction with entities/objects. Params: target_type, action, range.
atom_types.guide_commune: Communication with the Guide. Params: message_type, context.
atom_types.spawn_object: Instantiate a scene asset at offset from caster. Params: asset, offset, dimensions, duration, spawn_time, movement.

spawn_defaults.description: If spawn_time or duration are omitted from atom params, the engine uses 0.5s as default lifetime.
spawn_defaults.note: Skills that want shorter/longer lifetime must explicitly declare spawn_time. Movement only activates when BOTH spawn_time AND movement are present.

spawn_object_extended.description: When spawn_time AND movement are both present in spawn_object params, the object moves during its lifetime. If either is missing, object is static.

params.spawn_time: Total lifetime in seconds. Defaults to 0.5s if omitted.
